abilities.shortEffect: May cause bad poisoning when the Pokémon hits an opponent with a move.
abilities.effect: The power of the Pokémon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokémon hits with a move.

abilities.shortEffect: Boosts Attack if intimidated, and prevents being forced to switch out.
abilities.effect: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokémon to switch out also fail to work.
